edu.iu.jwt.WebTokenBuilder

Description
edu.iu.jwt

  • Uses of WebTokenBuilder in edu.iu.jwt

    Methods in edu.iu.jwt that return WebTokenBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.aud(URI... audience)
    Sets the token audience URIs.
    <T extends IuAuthorizationDetails>
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.authorizationDetails(T authorizationDetails, Class<T> type)
    Adds an authorization details entry.
    static WebTokenBuilder
    WebToken.builder()
    Gets a mutable WebTokenBuilder instance.
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.claim(String name, Object value, Type type)
    Sets a custom claim value.
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.exp(Instant expires)
    Sets the time after which the JWT should not be accepted.
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.iat()
    Indicates that WebTokenBuilder.build() should set the issued at time to the current time truncated to seconds.
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.iss(URI issuer)
    Sets the token issuer URI.
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.jti()
    Generates a unique token identifier.
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.jti(String tokenId)
    Provides a specific token identifier.
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.nbf(Instant notBefore)
    Sets the time before which the JWT should not be accepted.
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.nonce(String nonce)
    Sets the nonce claim.
    WebTokenBuilder
    WebTokenBuilder.sub(String subject)
    Sets the subject of the JWT.
